creator-forge

checking sidecar...
Tip: enter a niche/seed below, then jump to Studio to turn topics into scripts, and to Storyboard to break the script into scenes.

Niche research /research/niche

Autocomplete + YouTube search + outliers + DeepSeek verdict for a seed niche.

Keyword finder /research/keywords

Long-tail keyword expansion, KGR scoring, VPH of top videos.

Outlier finder /research/outlier

Small-channel videos with disproportionate views (views / subs).

Video cloner /research/cloner

Take a YouTube URL, pull title + transcript, generate clone-kit (title clones, hooks, outline).
5-step wizard: Topics → Titles → Outline → Script → Humanize. Each step feeds the next automatically.

1. Topics /studio/topics

Generate N topic ideas from a seed niche.

2. Titles /studio/titles

Pick a topic above (it auto-fills) and generate CTR-ranked titles.

3. Outline /studio/outline

8-part outline. Click a title above to fill this in.

4. Script /studio/script

Long-form script chunked from the 8-part outline.

5. Humanize /studio/humanize

Rewrite the script in a human, less LLM-detectable voice.
Break a long-form script into scenes — each with narration + image prompt + Veo3 video prompt. Use Send script → Storyboard from the Studio tab to fill this automatically.

Scene breakdown /producer/scene_breakdown

Long-form mode. Pick a template, set scene count + WPM, get a list of scenes with image_prompt + flow_video_prompt ready for AutoGrok / Veo3.

Grok accounts auth:setupAccounts (programmatic)

Email + password are stored in plaintext in accounts.json under Electron's userData directory (parity with autogrok-veo3, never committed). Use Auto-login (programmatic) to log every account in headfully via Puppeteer; browsers minimise after capture so the session stays fresh until cookies expire. Open manual login remains available as a fallback when automation fails (e.g. CAPTCHA / 2FA).

Configured accounts 0

Batch Image + Video image:generate · i2v:generate · video:generate

KCRACKER-style two-table panel: auto-fills image_prompt + video_prompt from the scene_breakdown above, then lets you batch-generate Grok images and videos independently. Choose I2V (image-to-video, uses each scene's hero image) or T2V (text-to-video, prompt-only). Outputs go to the configured folder; this panel does not compose a 9:16 mp4 — generate the assets here and stitch them downstream. Persistent Grok session is reused — log in once via the manual-login flow and cookies stay valid across app restarts (PR-11/12/13).
Checking Grok session…

Image batch

Video batch

Compose short /producer/short

TTS → captions → 9:16 mp4. Reuses the script above (or paste a different one). Edge-TTS voice + placeholder gradient background; AI per-scene visuals land in PR-A3+.
